title: epilobium parviflorum var. intermedium
intro: Epilobium parviflorum var. intermedium, also known as the small-flowered willowherb, is a plant species within the epilobium genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the willowherb family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epilobium parviflorum var. intermedium include reducing inflammation and improving urinary tract health, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and improving kidney function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water or by using them in tinctures, and it is also available as a dietary supplement.
